notableEvents.label: Luis Arraez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Luis Arraez grounds into a double play, second baseman Ben Williamson to shortstop Taylor Walls to first baseman Ryan Vilade. Casey Schmitt out at 2nd. Luis Arraez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Eric Haase GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Eric Haase grounds into a double play, third baseman Junior Caminero to second baseman Ben Williamson to first baseman Ryan Vilade. Jung Hoo Lee out at 2nd. Eric Haase out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Vilade reaches on a fielder's choice. Jonathan Aranda to 2nd. Jonathan Aranda advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by shortstop Willy Adames.

notableEvents.label: Drew Gilbert pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Drew Gilbert pops out to catcher Nick Fortes in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Drew Gilbert pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Drew Gilbert pops out to shortstop Taylor Walls.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Jonathan Aranda singles on a fly ball to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee. Chandler Simpson scores. Junior Caminero to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Jonny DeLuca pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jonny DeLuca out on a sacrifice bunt, catcher Eric Haase to first baseman Rafael Devers. Jonathan Aranda to 3rd. Ryan Vilade to 2nd.
